guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable selectable card group behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid when the interaction is not a user choice or does not need selection and form semantics.
guidance.responsive: Allow choices to wrap or stack while preserving their native group semantics.

title: Resizable Panels
accessibilityChecks: separators support arrow Home and End keys

guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable resizable panels behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid when semantic project markup and CSS already provide the structure without reusable behavior.
guidance.responsive: Preserve semantic order and allow project CSS to adapt layout without changing the component contract.

guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable wizard behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid when a native link or a simpler Composer navigation primitive fully expresses the navigation model.
guidance.responsive: Keep every destination and control keyboard and touch accessible at narrow widths.

title: Transfer List
accessibilityChecks: both option lists expose selection state

guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable transfer list behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid when the interaction is not a user choice or does not need selection and form semantics.
guidance.responsive: Allow choices to wrap or stack while preserving their native group semantics.

guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable color picker behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid for display-only values or when a native control already satisfies the complete project contract.
guidance.responsive: Keep labels, errors, and controls readable at narrow widths and 200 percent zoom.

title: Rating Input
accessibilityChecks: rating is a labeled radio group
each value has an accessible name

guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable rating input behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid when the interaction is not a user choice or does not need selection and form semantics.
guidance.responsive: Allow choices to wrap or stack while preserving their native group semantics.

title: Mention Input
accessibilityChecks: selection returns focus to the input
replaces: textarea with ad hoc mention popup

guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable mention input behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid for display-only values or when a native control already satisfies the complete project contract.
guidance.responsive: Keep labels, errors, and controls readable at narrow widths and 200 percent zoom.

title: Editable List
accessibilityChecks: focus returns after save or cancel
replaces: repeatable rows with unmanaged edit state

guidance.use: Use when a project needs reusable editable list behavior with the registered state and accessibility contract.
guidance.avoid: Avoid when project-specific business behavior would make the shared data contract misleading.
guidance.responsive: Preserve reading order and keyboard access; contain intentional overflow inside the component boundary.
